# LinkRescue

> LinkRescue monitors affiliate links across your entire site and catches broken links, stripped tracking parameters, and dead merchant pages that silently leak your commissions.

## Product

- [Homepage](https://www.linkrescue.io/): Broken affiliate link monitoring for affiliate marketers
- [Free Scan](https://www.linkrescue.io/free-scan): Scan any site for broken affiliate links — free, no signup
- [Link Checker](https://www.linkrescue.io/link-checker): Check individual affiliate links instantly
- [Revenue Calculator](https://www.linkrescue.io/affiliate-link-revenue-calculator): Estimate how much broken links cost you
- [Pricing](https://www.linkrescue.io/pricing): Free/Pro ($29/mo)/Agency ($79/mo)
- [Dashboard](https://www.linkrescue.io/dashboard): Monitor sites, view scan history, track health scores

## What It Does

- Full-Archive Crawling — Scans every page, not just your sitemap. Old reviews and tutorials that still rank get checked too.
- Parameter Integrity — Detects stripped or corrupted affiliate tracking parameters (Amazon tags, ShareASale IDs, etc.)
- Dead Merchant Detection — Catches merchant pages that 404 or redirect to generic homepages
- Daily Automated Scans — Set it and forget it. Get alerts when something breaks.
- Health Score — 0-100 score per site tracking link health over time with trend charts

## Pricing

- Starter (Free): 1 site, 200 pages/scan, weekly scans
- Pro ($29/month): 5 sites, 2,000 pages/scan, daily scans, revenue estimates
- Agency ($79/month): 25 sites, unlimited pages, hourly scans, API access, Slack integration

## Free Tools

- [Free Scan](https://www.linkrescue.io/free-scan): Full site scan, no signup required
- [Link Checker](https://www.linkrescue.io/link-checker): Check a single URL instantly
- [Revenue Calculator](https://www.linkrescue.io/affiliate-link-revenue-calculator): Estimate lost commissions

## Guides

- [Blog](https://www.linkrescue.io/blog): Affiliate link management guides and industry insights
